uses: Cephalophilon chinense, also known as the Chinese club moss, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Its medicinal uses include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The plant is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Additionally, Cephalophilon chinense is sometimes used to treat fever and digestive issues. More research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal potential and confirm its effectiveness for these uses.
